fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number associated with this transfer line.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Contains the number that the program assigns sequentially to each line in a transfer order.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that will be transferred.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item specified on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item that is transferred.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the general product posting group of the item on this line.
The program automatically copies the contents of this field from the Gen. Prod. field on the transfer order.

fields.name: Inventory Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the inventory posting group of the item on this line.
The program automatically copies the contents of this field from the Inventory Posting Group field on the transfer order.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Contains the quantity on the line expressed in base units of measure. The program fills in this field automatically.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip:
Contains the quantity per unit of measure.
The program automatically copies the contents of this field from the transfer order.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the gross weight of the item.
You may need the gross weight to complete customs documents, waybills, and other forms.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the net weight of the item.
You may need the net weight to complete customs documents, waybills, and other forms.

fields.name: Unit Volume
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the volume of one unit of the item.
You may have to know the item's unit volume to complete customs documents, waybills, and other forms.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Units per Parcel
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of units per parcel of the item.
You may need the number of units per parcel when you fill out customs documents, waybills, and so on.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description of the item being transferred.

fields.name: Transfer Order No.
fields.tooltip: Contains the number of the transfer order on which the transfer shipment was based.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the shipping agent you have used for this transfer shipment line.
The program copies the code from the Shipping Agent Code field on the transfer order line.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the shipping agent service you have used for this transfer shipment line.
The program copies the code from the Shipping Agent Service Code field on the transfer order line.

fields.name: In-Transit Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the in-transit code used for this shipment line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the In-Transit Code field in the Transfer Shipment Line table.

fields.name: Transfer-from Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the location from which the items on the line are transferred.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transfer-from Code field in the Transfer Order Line table.

fields.name: Transfer-to Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the location you want to transfer to.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transfer-to Code field in the Transfer Order Line table.

fields.name: Item Shpt. Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the item ledger entry associated with the transfer shipment line.
If you create a purchase invoice to assign item charges to this transfer line, the program will use this number.
The program creates the number when you post the line.
You cannot change the number because the shipment has already been posted.
Item Tracking
If the transfer shipment line carries multiple unique item tracking numbers when posted, this will result in one item ledger entry for each item tracking number. For such one-to-many relations, the Item Entry Relation table manages the relation to the item ledger entries in stead of the Item Shpt. Entry No. field.

fields.name: Shipping Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long it takes from when the items are shipped from the warehouse to when they are delivered.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Item Category Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the item category code for the item.
You can use item categories to group default item setup values to make creating new items easier. An item category code specifies the following values:

Default general product posting group.


Default inventory posting group.


Default VAT product posting group.


Default costing method.


To see or select item categories in the Item Category window, click the drop-down arrow in the field.

fields.name: Transfer-from Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the bin that the items are transferred from.
